title: Bedrock Parity
description: Bedrock Textures ported to Java Edition
body:
Bedrock and Java have some little pack differences that maybe you didn't notice, for example the Ender Dragon Fireball is totally different, this pack is a solution to make (obviously if you like) Java more similar to Bedrock
Frequently Asked Questions **DOES THIS HAVE ORE UI/BEDROCK SIMILAR GUI OR BEDROCK WATER COLORS?**
No, actually there are tons of packs to do these, this pack does other things
Credits [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
